title: Point Blank - Ferret's Misc Stuff
description: Adds some misc stuff to Point Blank (currently just Attachments)
body:
Adds a few things to Point Blank, currently just various attachments.
It's more built around adding things that aren't already in the mod, especially the little things you just want.
- ACOG-Style Backup Iron Sights
- Canted Laser Aiming Guide
- Diffuser Choke
- Citroi CXS / HS-12 Double Trigger Module
- Draco Muzzle
- Laser Foregrip
- Full Choke
- G3 AccellBurst Module
- HG Rail
- Amber Laser Module
- Blue Laser Module
- Cyan Laser Module
- Green Laser Module
- Magenta Laser Module
- Red Laser Module
- Unfocused Laser Module
- White Laser Module
- Yellow Laser Module
- Carbine-Length A3-Style Handlesight
- Full-Length A3-Style Handlesight
- Integrated A3-Style Handlesight
- Back-Only A3 Style Handlesight
- Short-Length A3-Style Handlesight
- M590 Slam Fire Module
- M870 Slam Fire Module
- M9 AccellBurst Module
- Magnum Rounds
- Match-Grade Rounds
- Mk23 Laser Aiming Module
- RF Muzzle Brake
- Slug Rounds
